warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Pass Throughs
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
Banded Lat Stretch
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Cossack Squat
5e/s Squat Knee Taps
10 Front Squat

strength.name: Front Squat
strength.description:
1x1 | * Breathe and brace at the top of each rep
* Elbows Up
* Keep knees out | BUILD 6 Sets E3MOM
00:00 5 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 2 @ 80%
12:00 1 @ 90%
15:00 1 @ 95%
18:00-28:00 1RM Attempts

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
15 min AMRAP
10 Cal Assault Bike (easy pace)
2 Rope Climbs
12 KB C&J (Single Arm)

hypertrophy.reasoning: Front squat and rope climbs heavily tax legs and core; accessory work targets antagonists and upper body hypertrophy.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Front Squat, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 15 minutes: 10 Cal Assault Bike (easy pace), 2 Rope Climbs, 12 KB C&J (Single Arm). For hypertrophy, focus on back, shoulders, arms.
